The provenance-survival commitment in §2.4 is honestly bounded — §5.3 concedes the frozen-provenance guarantee is promotion-scoped and flags the decision-consumed-but-unpromoted retention gap as a named follow-up rather than asserting coverage it lacks. The withdrawal and provenance claims conform to and do not exceed the schema authority.

From the EA altitude the timing/reversibility question stands: fixing a general, cited-as-authoritative mutation-governance principle in this shape now commits the platform to three control-types before any realizing design confirms the control-type is instantiable as stated. findings.claim: I attacked the record at EA altitude for committing the platform to a position that deserves its own decision record first — whether fixing per-class control-types smuggles in a remedy-boundary or governance-policy ruling belonging to the forthcoming governance design. It held: §2 explicitly fixes 'no policy, threshold, cadence, or mechanism'; §2.6 disclaims the supersede-vs-retract remedy boundary, reviewer-role assignments, thresholds, cadence, and retention windows, routing them downstream with citation direction correct (downstream cites this ADR, not the reverse); §6 boundary-check 5 reinforces it. findings.locus: §2.5 / §5.2 Cross-class precedence — withhold-and-escalate on structural collision with an EA-set governance scope
findings.claim: I attacked the cross-class precedence rule as a premature commitment that could pull against the Environment 'no per-write gate' posture or foreclose the forthcoming governance design's disposition space. It held: the rule is scoped to a gateway-mechanical conflict-detection firing only on structural collision with an EA-set governance scope (explicitly not a per-write human gate on the routine, ungated observation stream), fixes only the fail-safe direction (withhold, not admit), places human accountability at the resolution step, routes the richer resolution disposition to the forthcoming governance policy, and rests on a built interim instance (SDD-001 §3.5.2 SCOPE_CONFLICT). The commitment is proportionate to its reversibility and integrates with the Environment ungated-observation posture rather than contradicting it.
